MaXXXine (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $15,097,633Details
International Box Office $6,959,528
Worldwide Box Office $22,057,161
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,398,321
Total $1,398,321
Further financial details...

Synopsis

In 1980s Hollywood, adult film star and aspiring actress Maxine Minx finally gets her big break. But as a mysterious killer stalks the starlets of Hollywood, a trail of blood threatens to reveal her sinister past.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,705,038 (44.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.25 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:68.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,450 opening theaters/2,450 max. theaters, 2.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $15,965,308

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 5th, 2024 (Wide) by A24
International Releases: July 4th, 2024 (Wide) (Germany)
July 4th, 2024 (Wide) (Mexico)
July 4th, 2024 (Wide) (Paraguay)
July 4th, 2024 (Wide) (Austria)
July 4th, 2024 (Wide) (Colombia)
Video Release: August 2nd, 2024 by A24
MPA Rating: R for strong violence, gore, sexual content, graphic nudity, language and drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2829 (cert #54935), 4/10/2024)
Running Time: 104 minutes
Franchise: X (Mia Goth)
Filming location (city or town): Los Angeles, CA
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): California, United States

Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
